home.intro_title: Hello, my name is Mohd Ansar Bux
home.brief_intro: I'm a Web Appliction Developer with one year of training experience. Certified in Java Full Stack technology. My experties is to create and design website, Web-Application and many more...

about.bio: I'm Mohd Ansar Bux, hailing originally from Ajaigarh in district Panna, and currently based in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. I specialize in crafting software, web applications, and websites, alongside designing UX/UI experiences that blend functionality, user-friendliness, and responsiveness with aesthetic appeal. For me, the realm of design and development is more than just a profession; it's a boundless passion. I thrive on transforming intricate problems into elegant, intuitive designs.

experience.role: Java Full Stack Developer with Angular CLI
experience.description: EduBridge Learning Pvt. Ltd. provided me with an immersive training and internship experience in Java Full Stack with Angular CLI, equipping me with a robust skill set to thrive in the world of modern web development. Throughout the program, I delved deep into Java programming, mastering both fundamental and advanced concepts essential for building scalable applications.

Pentagon Space Pvt. Ltd. is a cutting-edge tech firm pioneering advancements in space technology. As a Java Full Stack Developer, I completed an intensive training program, mastering essential technologies like Core Java, JDBC, Servlets, MySQL Database, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, Spring, Spring Boot, Hibernate, JavaScript, JSP, and Apache Tomcat Server.
